title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Engineer Posts
description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Engineer Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the ...
